mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( post_id, reporter_id, reason_type, content, file_path, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{reasonType}, #{content}, #{filePath}, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id AS postId, reporter_id AS userId, reason_type AS reasonType, content, file_path AS filePath, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM report ORDER BY created_at DESC
